problem id: 6a333ed6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  01000000 -> 00000000
  01001100 -> 10001000
  10001101 -> 00010000
  11000111 -> 10001000
  10000100 -> 00000000
  01010100 -> 10001000
  10101010 -> 01010100
  00111111 -> 01100110
  01000011 -> 00000000
  11100010 -> 01000100

query: 11001001
predicted answer: 00010000
